mapper.select: SELECT ID, CATE_CD, CATE_NM, UP_CATE_CD, CATE_LVL, SORT_NO, LEAF_YN, USE_YN FROM IT_CATEGORY WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CATE_LVL, SORT_NO, CATE_CD
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM IT_CATEGORY WHERE CATE_CD = #{cateCd} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM IT_CATEGORY WHERE UP_CATE_CD = #{cateCd} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM IT_ITEM WHERE CATE_CD = #{cateCd} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO IT_CATEGORY (CATE_CD, CATE_NM, UP_CATE_CD, CATE_LVL, SORT_NO, LEAF_YN, USE_YN, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{cateCd}, #{cateNm}, #{upCateCd}, NVL(#{cateLvl},1), NVL(#{sortNo},1), NVL(#{leafYn},'Y'), NVL(#{useYn},'Y'), #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE IT_CATEGORY SET CATE_NM = #{cateNm}, UP_CATE_CD = #{upCateCd}, CATE_LVL = #{cateLvl}, SORT_NO = #{sortNo}, LEAF_YN = #{leafYn}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE IT_CATEGORY SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT I.ID, I.COMP_CD, I.ITEM_CD, I.ITEM_NM, I.SPEC, I.CATE_CD, CT.CATE_NM, I.UNIT_CD, I.ITEM_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS ITEM_TYP_NM, I.TAX_TYP, TX.CD_NM_KO AS TAX_TYP_NM, I.ITEM_STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS ITEM_STS_NM, I.REG_ID FROM IT_ITEM I LEFT JOIN IT_CATEGORY CT ON CT.CATE_CD = I.CATE_CD AND CT.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='ITEM_TYP' AND T.CD=I.ITEM_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE TX ON TX.GRP_CD='TAX_TYP' AND TX.CD=I.TAX_TYP AND TX.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='ITEM_STS' AND S.CD=I.ITEM_STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE I.DEL_YN = 'N'
AND (I.ITEM_CD LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR I.ITEM_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND I.CATE_CD = #{cateCd} AND I.ITEM_STS = #{itemSts} ORDER BY I.ITEM_CD

SELECT I.ID, I.COMP_CD, I.ITEM_CD, I.ERP_ITEM_CD, I.ITEM_NM, I.ITEM_NM_EN, I.SPEC, I.CATE_CD, CT.CATE_NM, I.UNIT_CD, I.ITEM_TYP, I.TAX_TYP, I.SAFETY_STOCK, I.REORDER_POINT, I.ORDER_QTY, I.MOQ, I.LEAD_TIME, I.REP_VD_CD, I.REP_VD_NM, I.ITEM_STS, I.REMARK, I.USE_YN, I.REG_ID FROM IT_ITEM I LEFT JOIN IT_CATEGORY CT ON CT.CATE_CD = I.CATE_CD AND CT.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE I.ID = #{id} AND I.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO IT_ITEM (COMP_CD, ITEM_CD, ERP_ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, ITEM_NM_EN, SPEC, CATE_CD, UNIT_CD, ITEM_TYP, TAX_TYP, SAFETY_STOCK, REORDER_POINT, ORDER_QTY, MOQ, LEAD_TIME, REP_VD_CD, REP_VD_NM, ITEM_STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{itemCd}, #{erpItemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{itemNmEn}, #{spec}, #{cateCd}, #{unitCd}, #{itemTyp}, NVL(#{taxTyp},'TAX'), NVL(#{safetyStock},0), NVL(#{reorderPoint},0), NVL(#{orderQty},0), NVL(#{moq},0), NVL(#{leadTime},0), #{repVdCd}, #{repVdNm}, NVL(#{itemSts},'ACTIVE'), #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE IT_ITEM SET ITEM_NM = #{itemNm}, ITEM_NM_EN = #{itemNmEn}, SPEC = #{spec}, CATE_CD = #{cateCd}, UNIT_CD = #{unitCd}, ITEM_TYP = #{itemTyp}, TAX_TYP = #{taxTyp}, SAFETY_STOCK = NVL(#{safetyStock},0), REORDER_POINT = NVL(#{reorderPoint},0), ORDER_QTY = NVL(#{orderQty},0), MOQ = NVL(#{moq},0), LEAD_TIME = NVL(#{leadTime},0), REP_VD_CD = #{repVdCd}, REP_VD_NM = #{repVdNm}, ITEM_STS = #{itemSts}, REMARK = #{remark}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE IT_ITEM SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
